purpose: Versioned commercial pricing defaults consumed by local and Tencent TKE production environments.
machineBoundary: Default compute hourly price, storage GB-month price, markup, currency, and environment variable mapping.

lifecycle.removalCondition: Replace only with a newer current pricing contract and matching migration notes.

rules: GPU pricing is not part of the current production catalog.
Environment templates and runtime defaults must use this catalog version until a newer contract replaces it.
